vocab.meaning: bị lấp đầy/hỗn loạn bởi quảng cáo
vocab.example: I tend to avoid news portals that are cluttered with advertisements, as they distract from the reading experience.

vocab.meaning: trải nghiệm người dùng mượt mà
vocab.example: I frequently visit high-end retail websites because they offer a seamless user experience from browsing to checkout.

vocab.meaning: dấu chân kỹ thuật số (lịch sử hoạt động trên mạng)
vocab.example: I am quite selective about the platforms I log into, as I want to manage my digital footprint carefully.

vocab.meaning: lượng thông tin khổng lồ/phong phú
vocab.example: Educational sites like Khan Academy provide a wealth of information for those looking to self-study complex subjects.

vocab.meaning: mô hình dựa trên đăng ký thuê bao
vocab.example: I often access academic archives that operate on a subscription-based model to ensure the data is peer-reviewed.

vocab.meaning: nội dung lan truyền nhanh chóng
vocab.example: I occasionally visit entertainment hubs to keep up with the latest viral content and internet memes.

vocab.meaning: cộng đồng dựa trên diễn đàn
vocab.example: Being part of a forum-based community like Reddit allows me to engage in deep dives on very specific hobbies.

vocab.meaning: điều hướng trực quan (dễ sử dụng)
vocab.example: The reason I prefer that travel blog is its intuitive navigation, which makes finding destination guides effortless.

vocab.meaning: cập nhật theo thời gian thực
vocab.example: Financial websites are essential for me to get real-time updates on stock market fluctuations.

vocab.meaning: bảo vệ dữ liệu cá nhân
vocab.example: I only frequent reputable banking sites that employ advanced encryption to safeguard personal data.
